twitch_info.title: wonderful warmup then vandal blind-ish playthrough

message.body: it's fine but maybe it's all quiet
well i put myself at +6 on my stream
idk i was using an extension to make it louder than max loud so i think that counts as you're quiet
can you put bigrat sidebar next stream
retrace my steps has a traced recolored default vine
hempuli went live. streamin manor perhaps ?
are you getting muted for this one
did u see that she marked a bottomless pit as dangerous
now i extra gotta check what's down there
imagine if u died 3 fewer times
it's actually less time between vandal and the pyramids existing than between vandal and now
i genuinely have no memory of these screens unvandalized
how often are you watching blow game
wolfi would never copy the entire room 6 to make sure the correct music plays there
oh that's in base game too
i fixed that in vandal this month
how could the testers miss this
thank god that makes my life way easier
hey, i heard someone mention blow games about 20 mins ago
sure i'll take credit for it
yeah replaying the blow games it was funny how many times i went "wait i know this room.. riiiiiiiight"
oh i remembered it as solo for some reason
what do you mean post-test had more stuff
and also that i wasn't testing it
u said the wrong word like 3 times in that sentence
yeah i was getting very confused
you said recap instead of flow game followed by recap instead of twourney
alright just tl;dr for me what changed between tourney and post-tourney then
stuff changed between tourney and pre-tourney
it wasn't done? i didn't remember that
guess i'll have to replay it huh
yeah but you said that only you had worked on it for tourney then v worked on it post-tourney?
cause yeah i said i remembered it as solo and was worng, then you said i remembered it as solo cause v did stuff later or something
arzt wants manor fun adventure times and you give him the gimmick needle hypertwister
it's ok i made the hardest needle for tourney 1
look we didn't have a second familys incident it's fine
nobody public has any ideas of issues with recap
pay no attention to the fires behind us
If there were issues with recap I had no idea, speaking as a participant
dude that games dev was a fire pit lol
maybe one day kurath and/or me will put out a non tourney version of the spire game
not a dumpster, but it was constantly on fire
yeah from the get go idea it started on fire lol
i won't lie, as soon as i saw the idea pop up i thought there wasn't a chance in hell
was honestly shocked when i saw how much it had
@Naloas i did too which is why i made sure the project got started before conversation died down that day
look the number of times i've seen someone say "wouldn't it be cool if" and then something happens is unshockingly close to 0
vandal is so nice... probably the needle game I've played the most (with very casual speedruns)
i'm always caught a bit offguard how popular/influential vandal still is
this background effect is to this day the second biggest sprite in vanvan
the credits screenshot compilation is massive
is there a kettle going off in the background?
ok i guess thats why the mic just got muted lol
it's not that noticeable, i just thought i was hearing things again
not sure if vacuuming works for dog poop
are you also talking about dogs?
this save start is iconically strange
Guy mod that adds titlecards for all the game references
i actually thought it was a vanvan thing for a moment
wolfi would never withhold a save from u after the screen transition
i hope vanvan has title cards now
only on first entering an area, not on reset
joke would get old on reset
my birth was a blessing and you will be thankful for it
I wonder what is the ratio of work hours between vandal's original development and vanvan
honestly i could believe them to be equal
partly cause i know wolfi goes hard
I imagine vanvan is higher at this point
yeah you got acid poop when you should've flown
why do we let wolfi get away with this floor number gaslighting
kids nowadays can't appreciate jtool needle
the gimmick is look ahead and you failed
it's a very alright game that was a big deal for its time
honestly it's above average still actually
you know when you don't know what to stream next but you want to keep streaming?
but you don't know what to play so i guess i'll end?
can we get someone to extend the qoqoqo -> vovovo -> vorovo chain
verve will always be there for you
i didn't consider making no promises let's you make promises for other people
oh really? but my times are ok for you?
i don't stream for people to watch cause i'm evil like that
today was a bit on the shorter side to be fair
they got it working well for me but i won't say i'm surprised
there's a reason the OS is w7 lol
i think it's a laptop moment for some people? the graphics card sometimes just doesn't
the hotel was like 15 fps for me on the first version
tfw you need a graphics card for a fangame
admittedly making the shaders work in the first place is floogle behavior
yeah i never got the floogle placement
kady/nader/marc/uber were def not involved in def
eh, here and there? nothing popular
I imagine this one tower specifically was inspired by cn3?
vovovo, neon 3, and vandal are all cn3 responses
well cn3 clearly came out first
you were just told how long it is in the intermission
if it has numbers it must be 100 floors
ok but your game had numbers
nal those rooms did not have numbers
i don't remember what they were, there was at least 2 numbers
nal, the blocks just happened to look similar to a number. there were no numbers written in the rooms
that game had so many recolored tilesets
i think we got bad news for dldc...
i guess i got bad news for dldc...
the original tilesets are just so good
i think this would make me quit
that was a peak fangame moment there
one tester said a jump really far in was way too hard
then wolfi had to ask them if they remembered they could let go of jump to go lower
does anyone know what these game references are
how could the testers miss that
i got called out by arz for not figuring out you could soft lock yourself with acid poop in an earlier floor
fun fact, if you go right at the start of the save you're on
(go right, it's easier if you can see)
so you could skip this diagonal at the bottom
cause wolfi just... didn't have the two side spikes there
skull, chatran, and wolfi all missed that lol
to be fair i did it too on the first attempt, however they probably first tried and i died and then saw it
i like pointing that one out cause it's the easiest testplay thing to remember
no idea what else i affected
assume noone else remembers and take credit for everything
the vandal review: now with all the jumps
yeah you're pretty good that's why
the 30s were decently challenging for me
ok but that's 100fm that makes sense
i did not think i'd enjoy clearing that game with it's difficulty at points lol
those delicious fruit look a little past their expiration date
i think it's two stages on from here? bounce block
what i can't promise is that i'll be awake for it
so this was where the tester forgot about letting go
i never know what the full jump diagonal is
i was told you were asleep verve
oh you were playing gacha, i get it
hungrytag got cancelled after old tweets resurfaced...
moleyos were mostly wolfi to be fair
you already had rukito and kale
made me think of like a radar
i'm obligated to because of speaking with aina so much at some point
this end platform was my bane in testing
i could not grab it for some reason
this coming from the figure runner
haven't played enough lucien needle then
at this point to me 100f and blow game is different
or 100f and one life game, however you want to phrase it
like churatch is still a blow game as silly as it is
figure and CN? most certainly not lol
which is really just a point of reasonability really
if you like doing rooms but different, let me tell you
you heard it here first nal: this decade's the one. probably
while i have more faith in vanvan than buy balloons, i have more faith in sts than vanvna
i can't believe things are easier when you've done them before
i sure was a pixel awa6y
a little sad about how 3 ended but it is what it is
3 was the bonk jump, not the water
i'm pretty sure this game is actually 100 floors
hmm vandal is probably closer to 100 screens than 50
have you tried prerecording your streams
it's fine, not like chat is on stream
yeah i probably should've thought of that too tbh
em testplaying a game they isn't even playing
i claim partial responsibility for getting wolfi to deathless this
i just thought it was typical wolfi business enjoying his own games
i think i was the first person to start an every other save vandal playthrough. huse then did it after me and actually finished. wolfi started his some time after
huh i didn't know anyone other than wolfi did that
no clue, but when i first played vandal i think i beat it daily for 6 days in a row so i was probably pretty good
dark horse. noun. a little-known, unexpectedly successful entrant, as in a horserace.
right verve was a maker person first, i actually forgot at this point
i just didn't finish anything notable until after maker
yeah people struggle with that line
some people just commit their own kinds of gamemaker crimes
such as entirely too much 4px grid
even on replay this game took me a good 4+?
man vandal impossible really only took wolfi 37 hours
admittedly he did that on the back of 2+ easier challenge runs
thats like saying "admittedly he did it with practice"
i don't think i could do that challenge that fast with practice
the tower is insane to me
i just don't know if this thing is 10,000km
wait does this mean i can full jump everything in cn?
i think i've done that on two separate first attempts
this game took 2 months to make btw
so you're saying your lack of look ahead is at fault
what gimmick did you think it was??
that was a much clearer green than blue green
also it doesn't have the glow
or the sprite type like the blue one next to it
water isn't blue actually it's just reflecting the sky
nah i'm just taking issue thinking that was acid poop lol
cause the sprite looks like that blue one there but green
you're right though i never thought about acid poop not being in the tower
green cherry was annoying to prevent weird alt routes or unexpected things
+ it was the gimmick I felt like I struggled the most to design around
old man really did say that
this bridge predicted silksong? think about it
warpie's wabbawahoo is a fangame millionaire question
ty for playing, still nice to watch people after all these years
"thank you for watching wolfi" and noone else ??? i see
release Vanvan and you'll have the maker buff as well Verve
it's gonna be way too hard for me too lol
yeah there's plenty of years for consideration
